name: Ferguson Golf Institute
about: Ferguson Golf Institute operates as a multi-location training studio with facilities in Forest Hill and Churchville, Maryland. They specialize in golf instruction, club fitting, and simulator usage, utilizing launch monitor data, high-speed video, and biomechanical analysis. The venue offers a range of services from one-on-one lessons to junior programs and corporate outings, catering to golfers of all skill levels looking to improve their game in a structured environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium launch monitor technology for data-driven swing analysis
Comprehensive junior programs and leagues for young golfers
BYOB policy allows golfers to bring their own food and drinks
Extensive club fitting services with a wide range of equipment brands
Experienced coaching staff with a proven track record of success

food_and_drink.notes: Food is welcome at both locations
BYOB policy - bring your own alcohol

simulator_hardware.notes: Uneekor bay rentals available at both locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators. The facility also offers club fitting services if you need equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, both Forest Hill and Churchville locations have a BYOB policy where you can bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator availability and your pace. Typical sessions are 1-3 hours for 9 holes, so 18 holes would likely take 2-6 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ferguson Golf Institute offers extensive junior golf programs including winter and fall leagues, summer camps, and PGA Jr Tour events, making it very kid-friendly.
